title: Update webdriverio to version 4.2.16 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.2.16.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.2.16
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of webdriverio. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 12 commits . - [`d14d392`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/d14d392773d42d000ac0255a41d30ddf6dd0fd59) v4.2.16 - [`96238ec`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/96238ec9537628b2fea824e52a53e148b91c282e) Update contributors - [`7dd0906`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/7dd090646e70427a8ec23e02d66b295f3d4e47ca) updated changelog - [`cc68b4d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/cc68b4d715ac1fda1990f6f69949dc80f9a3b6d5) grab selector from last result if null - closes #1596 - [`ba423d4`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/ba423d4626e1500dd7a348c673913c8f51b4ada2) add comment on serving assets of allure reports [ci skip] - [`b944f72`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/b944f724937f7f91db24df7934a53765e9a0b1d2) Merge pull request #1595 from brollb/patch-2 - [`5f82bd0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/5f82bd0bdd17402992726367b52be75e5ae80032) Fixed typo in doc - [`541bf03`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/541bf037d73dec73dad9575f144740afa4453459) Merge pull request #1594 from brollb/patch-1 - [`c840a41`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c840a41aa08d18eeecd074d06e84249e4607683c) Fixed doc issue (executeAsync -> execute) - [`22da0f7`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/22da0f7b59e6406062eb0dcea2f4902df1a45ee3) promote spec reporter - [`8de5bce`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/8de5bce8b9ba0df84b9228e02a2111c4e4416105) Merge pull request #1592 from fijijavis/patch-1 - [`99ccf76`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/99ccf765b9c9e05c0de749fa6edc68d2d8563ca5) Change reference to wdio-json-reporter See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/65172a3bb6c42200e8d2894d5af0fa4b61d7c9a6...d14d392773d42d000ac0255a41d30ddf6dd0fd59). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
